exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your music production forward
items: What specific musical story or emotion are you trying to convey through your production, and how does this vision align with your current technical skills and artistic influences?
What are the fundamental sonic characteristics that define your desired musical genre or style, and which core production techniques should you master first to authentically capture these elements?

How do the physical limitations and capabilities of your current recording environment and equipment shape the kind of music you can realistically produce, and what creative opportunities might these constraints actually present?

What are the essential building blocks of musical arrangement and composition that you need to understand before diving into advanced production techniques, and how can you systematically develop your ear for frequency balance, dynamics, and spatial relationships?

How do you currently process and internalize musical information when listening to reference tracks, and what specific analytical listening techniques can you develop to decode the production decisions that create the emotional impact you want to achieve in your own music?

What foundational music theory concepts—from chord progressions and harmonic tension to rhythm patterns and melodic structure—do you need to understand to make informed creative decisions in your productions, and how can you balance theoretical knowledge with intuitive musical expression?
